GitHub Release v1.0.0 points at the exact validated source commit and records the evidence and non-claim boundary in release notes.

No MP3, M4B, audio-embedded EPUB, or other audio artifact is produced or approved for v1.0.0.

Manual keyboard-only review, screen-reader review, measured contrast audit, runtime security validation, external audit, and external peer review remain future quality work.
